features.evidence: -Laptop is great product and good enough to play most new titles @ high settings -GPU and CPU do get really hot under full load on Turbo mode (GPU=87C and CPU=94C) but custom fan curves using armory crate software will help with that

-GTAV very high settings over 100 FPS in 1080p and 70 to 110 FPS @ 1440p on external monitor through HDMI -Furmark =133 FPS @1080p (8000 score in Furmark gpu stress test) almost on par with the 3060 desktop GPU
Battery life could be better? But it does recharge quickly DO NOT leave it on sleep mode when traveling, turn it all the way off or the battery will dump
It was a great value (I got it on sale?) For the price the specs are great

-300HZ Screen is SUPER smooth on high fps games, and the colors are also more accurate than lower SRGB screens-Battery last a long time (5hours+) if in ECO mode and just browsing and watching movies/music -Backlit RGB keyboard is nice, can switch between many lighting setting and colors, and 3 brightness levels
-RAM 2x 8Gig 4800Mhz ram, so its dual channel which really gives a boost in gaming performance I use this device for light gaming, programming and Work
-1 Year ASUS accidental damage Warranty,-240 Watt Charger gets super hot when gaming, maybe consider some cooling fan blow on charger for charger longevity

-Backlit RGB keyboard is nice, can switch between many lighting setting and colors, and 3 brightness levels The keyboard backlight is a little weak even at maximum , the FKEYS especially, that aside for the cost I believe it to be a good acquisition for school/Work and light gaming
-Touchpad is smooth/accurate and does exactly what it should Num pad included and the trackpad is responsive

-1 Year ASUS accidental damage Warranty,-240 Watt Charger gets super hot when gaming, maybe consider some cooling fan blow on charger for charger longevity My Pros: I have had no issues with overheating thus far, I'll run further battery tests and provide an update needs be
-Wifi surprisingly sucks when connecting to access points far away(10metes +) compared to my office Dell laptop
